content:

```json
	{"bbox_2d": [442, 183, 653, 195], "text_content": "Table 7. USB data MUX select"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 203, 927, 226], "text_content": "Value\nDescription"},

	{"bbox_2d": [70, 278, 115, 290], "text_content": "2.2.12"},
	{"bbox_2d": [162, 277, 308, 289], "text_content": "VBUS_VS_DISCH"},
	{"bbox_2d": [162, 295, 917, 319], "text_content": "This input pin is used to sense VBUS presence, monitor VBUS voltage, and discharge VBUS from the USB Type-C receptacle side."},
	{"bbox_2d": [162, 325, 877, 350], "text_content": "A serial resistor connected to the pin must be used to limit the discharge current through the pin. Maximum discharge current is 50 mA."},
	{"bbox_2d": [162, 355, 923, 380], "text_content": "The discharge is activated automatically during cable disconnection, transition to a lower PDO voltage, hard reset and error recovery state. The discharge time is programmable by NVM (see Section 5 Start-up configuration)."},

	{"bbox_2d": [162, 395, 250, 407], "text_content": "VREG_1V2"},
	{"bbox_2d": [162, 413, 871, 438], "text_content": "This pin is used only for external decoupling of the 1.2 V internal regulator. The recommended decoupling capacitor is: 1 µF typ. (0.5 µF min., 10 µF max.)"},
	{"bbox_2d": [70, 457, 115, 469], "text_content": "2.2.14"},
	{"bbox_2d": [162, 456, 207, 468], "text_content": "VSYS"},
	{"bbox_2d": [162, 474, 909, 512], "text_content": "This is the low power supply from the system, if there is any. It can be connected directly to a single cell Lithium battery or to the system power supply delivering 3.3 V or 5 V. It is recommended to connect the pin to ground when it is not used."},
	{"bbox_2d": [70, 530, 115, 542], "text_content": "2.2.15"},
	{"bbox_2d": [162, 529, 252, 541], "text_content": "VREG_2V7"},
	{"bbox_2d": [162, 547, 871, 572], "text_content": "This pin is used only for external decoupling of the 2.7 V internal regulator. The recommended decoupling capacitor is: 1 µF typ. (0.5 µF min., 10 µF max.)"},
	{"bbox_2d": [70, 591, 115, 603], "text_content": "2.2.16"},
	{"bbox_2d": [162, 590, 197, 602], "text_content": "VDD"},
	{"bbox_2d": [162, 608, 727, 620], "text_content": "This is the power supply from the USB power line for applications powered by VBUS."},
	{"bbox_2d": [70, 972, 159, 980], "text_content": "DS12499 - Rev 8"},
	{"bbox_2d": [872, 972, 927, 980], "text_content": "page 9/42"}
]
```
